name: CZ75自动型 | 先驱
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. It has been custom painted with a red and grey racing theme. We only get one chance at this, let's do it right - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 这把武器使用红色和灰色的赛车主题图案进行了自定义涂装。 机会仅有一次，大家好好把握住 - 指挥官费利克斯.莱利
